title: 콘텐츠 발행 패키지 생성기
estimatedCost: Depends on the user's selected model and platform plan; optional publishing connectors use the user's own accounts
requirements: A host model that can load Markdown instructions; no separate runtime or API key is required for draft-only mode
disclaimer: Users run this package with their own environment, model account, API keys, publishing accounts, and memory files. Actual publishing happens only after user confirmation.
